sections.title: Chef René Moreau
sections.subtitle: Private dining & supper clubs — New Orleans, LA

sections.text: René turned our dining room into a restaurant for one night. Our guests are still talking about the third course.

sections.body: Intimate dinners for 4 to 20. Seasonal menus designed around your guests, your space, and the occasion — sourced from local farms wherever possible. Engagement dinners, anniversary suppers, and monthly supper clubs. Fully staffed service available.

sections.caption: Six-course autumn tasting menu — Garden District residence
